notes: This report compares HEAD against the current working tree for image-color-tags.json only.
No production qbank data was modified while generating this report.
The existing guard supports --allow-image-tag-correction true for changed scalar values, but structural removals/deletions are still blocked by scripts/guard-protected-qbank-files.mjs.
